titleStmt.title: SII 9.241: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 241. (A.R. No. 696 of 1919.) ON A SLAB LYING NEAR THE BHOGESVARA TEMPLE AT RAMADURGA, ALUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 5th year of the Chāḷukya king Jagadēkamalladēva (II), Dundubhi, Māgha, puṇṇami, Sōmavāra, Sōma-grahaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1143 February 1 Monday, on which day there was a lunar eclipse. Under the orders of the Mahāpradhāna and Sandhivigrahi Kēsimayya-Daṇḍanāyaka ruling over Manadaḍi-nāḍu, Miriti-nāḍu, Kōsage-nāḍu, Gāḷidiṟukūru-nāḍu, Kallakeḷagu-nāḍu, Koḷihāke-nāḍu and Sindavāḍi-nāḍu, his son and subordinate the Daṇḍanāyaka Chīyamarasa is said to have made a grant of the village Honnanahāḷu for the service of the god Bhōgēśvaradēva of Indavali and placed it in charge of Bhōgarāśi-Paṇḍita, the āchārya of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgasiracu(ścu)ṁbicaṁdracāmaracāra
vē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śva
sti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājā
dhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷa
kaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatu pratāpacakravartti ja
gadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipra
varddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ kalyāṇapurada
nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkatāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyu
ttavire tva(ta)tpādapadmōpajīvi samastaprasastisahi
taṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānanantaṟpurādhyakṣa kariturayapa
ṭṭasāhaṇi śrīkaraṇa sarvvādhyakṣaṁ hērilāḷasandhivigrahi
sēnādhipati manedaḍenāḍa miṟitināḍa kōsage gāḷidiṟu
kūrunāḍa kallakeḷagunāḍa koḷihākenāḍa siṁdavāḍināḍa hegga
ḍe mahāpradhāna daṁḍanāyaka kēsimayyaṁgaḷa vesadiṁ siṁda
vāḍi sāyirada heggaḍe magaṁ daṁḍanāyaka cīyamarasarā nā
ḍaṁ pratipāḷisi rājyaṁgeyyuttirddādavaniyayinūṟaṟa baḷiya
senupavāḷadoḷagaṇiṁdavaliya svayaṁbhu śrībhōgēśvaradēvargge
śrīmaccāḷukyapratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēvavarṣada 5 ne
ya duṁdubhisaṁvatsarada māghada puṇname sōmavāra sōmagraha
ṇadaṁdu Uttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇanimittadiṁ dēvaraṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōga
kkaṁ pātrapāvuḷa nivēdya cayitrapayitraśkhaṁḍapūjitajīrṇnōddhāra tapōdha
nara brāhmaṇaraṁnadānakkā nāḍoḷagaṇa honnanahāḷaṁ bhōgēśvaradēva
rācāryyaṁ bhōgarāsipaṁḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭarī dharmma
maṁ kiḍalīyade sanpavāḍada saudarayiṁdavāliya garuḍiseṭṭiya makkaḷuma
kkaḷā(ḷā)diyāgi yāyayinavaṁ sarvasvaṁ pratipāḷisiyārayvarārōrvva
rā nāḷge Arasāgi baṁdarella pratipāḷisuvaru pratipāḷisidavargge vā
raṇāsikurukṣētravargghyatīrtthāprayāgeyalu sāvira kavileyaṁ kōḍuṁ
koḷugumaṁ suvarṇnadiṁ kaṭṭasi caturvvēdapāragarige dānaṁgeydu koṭṭa
phala Ī dharmmavanāvanōrvvanu sudharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisade keḍisidavargge yā
sthānadalā kavileymaṁ brāhmaṇarumanaḷida pātaka . bhōgarāsipaṁḍita haḷipuri
yāḷdu kētarāsipaṁḍitaru ha . svadattadviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ pūrvvadattānu pā
layētu pūrvvadattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niḻphalaṁ bhavētu . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
bahubhirvvasudhā dattaṁ rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā
bhūmiḥ tasya tasya tadā phalaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.241 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
